title: GrappleVS
description: Fork of Grappling Hook Mod Reforged with added Valkyrien Skies support.
body:
This is a fixed version of the Grappling Hook mod with Valkyrien Skies support! Forked from this mod [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grappling-hook-mod-reforged)

Original mod [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grappling-hook-mod)

This mod may be taken down if the original Grapple Hook mod updates.
